bird.name: Coleto
bird.summary: The coleto (Sarcops calvus) is a starling species (family Sturnidae) in the monotypic genus Sarcops. It is endemic to the Philippines.

relations.subject: Coleto
relations.evidence: This bird's habitat is primary and secondary forest and scrubland up to 1,000 meters above sea level
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Coleto
relations.evidence: However, deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
